description: Per-item field reactivity (§42; bug64 surface). Clicking the first todo's toggle calls toggle(todo.id), mapping @todos so id=1's done flips true; only that row's .status re-renders to 'true', id=2 stays false. Uses a block-body arrow (avoids the `? {` SQL-misparse).
rationale: §42 a per-item handler that rewrites the backing collection re-renders the affected row's interpolations; the keyed reconciler updates id=1 in place and leaves id=2 untouched.

expect.dom:
• Buy milktrue
  • Walk dogfalse
